text: POPE-RUBIO SUMMIT: Rubio met Pope Leo XIV at Vatican for 45 min — 'frank conversation' on Iran war disagreements. Pope gave olive-wood pen as peace symbol. Earlier Pope surprised 13 Lebanese priests via video: 'Peace is near.' Trump had accused Pope of 'endangering' Catholics. Vatican-US tensions over war continuing to escalate.
verificationNote: CNN, NPR, Washington Times confirmed Vatican meeting and video call details.

text: FOOD IMPACT: USDA forecasts food-at-home +3.1% for 2026 (revised up from 2.5%). Beef +12.1% YoY. UN Food Price Index +1.6% in April (highest 3+ years). Average US grocery bill up $14/week ($182 vs $168 pre-war). If Hormuz persists through summer, food-at-home could add 5-7 more percentage points.
verificationNote: USDA ERS confirmed food price forecasts. FAO confirmed UN Food Index. Bloomberg confirmed 3-year high.

text: TANKER WAR ESCALATION: US Navy F/A-18 fired precision munitions into smokestacks of Iranian tankers Sea Star III and Sevda — disabling both. IRGC retaliated by seizing tanker Ocean Koi. US has now disabled 4 vessels, redirected 57. Iran retains ability to escalate via counter-seizures. Tanker war dynamics mirroring 1980s.
verificationNote: NPR, Stars and Stripes, Al Jazeera confirmed both tanker operations.

text: KHARG ISLAND: Copernicus Sentinel satellite images show ~45 sq km oil slick west of Kharg Island — Iran's main export hub. Iran denies, calls it 'psychological warfare.' If from infrastructure damage, could indicate war damage to export facilities previously hidden by Iran.
verificationNote: Jerusalem Post and Times of Israel confirmed satellite imagery. Iran denial from state TV.

text: LEBANON FRONT COLLAPSE: IDF struck 85+ Hezbollah targets in 24h including underground Beqaa weapons site. 7 killed across Toura, Anqoun, Kfar Chouba. Hezbollah claimed 26 attacks including FIRST cross-border strikes on Israeli territory since April ceasefire (Nahariya + Meron bases). Merkava tank hit by guided missile.
verificationNote: Jerusalem Post, CNN, PBS confirmed IDF strikes and Hezbollah cross-border claims.

text: HORMUZ CLASHES: Fars and Tasnim reporting 'sporadic clashes' between IRGN and USN in the strait today. Iranian source warns: 'More clashes if Americans try to enter the Gulf again.' Separate from yesterday's destroyer engagement — appears to be ongoing low-level friction.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera liveblog and NBC News confirmed sporadic clashes report from Iranian media.

text: DEAL WATCH: Trump expects Iran response 'tonight.' Rubio in Rome: 'We should know something today.' Vance meeting Qatar PM at White House on Pakistan-mediated peace process. Iran FM spokesman says proposal 'under review.' 14-point MOU: declares end of war + 30-day Hormuz negotiation period. Nuclear moratorium: US wants 20yr, Iran 5yr, compromise ~12yr.
verificationNote: CNN, CNBC, Axios, CBS News confirmed all diplomatic developments.

text: SANCTIONS UPDATE: OFAC designated 10 entities across China, Middle East, Eastern Europe for supplying Shahed drone components and satellite imagery to Iran. Part of Economic Fury. Also: State Dept sanctioned Qingdao Haiye Oil Terminal (Chinese port importing Iranian crude). 35 shadow banking entities designated.
verificationNote: US Treasury press release sb0496 and State Department confirmed designations.

text: OIL MARKETS: Brent $101.29 (+26.9% from pre-war), WTI $95.42 (+26.4%). Weekly loss >6% on peace deal hopes despite continued Hormuz closure. 170M barrels stuck on 166 tankers (Kpler). Only 191 vessels crossed in all of April vs 4,200 normal. IEA released 400M barrels from strategic reserves — largest coordinated release ever.
verificationNote: CNBC confirmed oil prices. Kpler and Wikipedia confirmed tanker/barrel data. IEA release confirmed.
